title: Neoantigen vaccine generates intratumoral T cell responses in phase Ib glioblastoma trial
indication_summary: Newly diagnosed MGMT-unmethylated glioblastoma; NeoVax personalized neoantigen synthetic-long-peptide vaccine (pools A-D) + poly-ICLC, prime-boost. 10 enrolled, 2 withdrawn, 8 vaccinated.

patients.quoted_text: Patient 1; 13 vaccine peptides; HLA A01:01/A25:01/B18:01/B08:01; on dexamethasone during priming
patients.vaccine_platform_detail: personalized neoantigen synthetic long peptides (15-30mer) in pools A-D + poly-ICLC; prime-boost
